productDisplayName: Fila Men Craze Brown Casual Shoes
description: fila specialises in high-quality sport footwear. These casual slip-on shoes from fila are the perfect foot-style choice for the contemporary man of style. Pair these sturdy, comfortable and breathable pair with with bermudas in a similar hue, or jeans and a bright tee. Upper Fabric upper with synthetic overlay Reinforced overlay on the midfoot and heel cup for comfort Branded tongue Mock metal eyelets without laces for easy wearability PU overlay on the toe box for abrasion-free comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort Misole PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole TPU outsole with multidirectional lugs for grip and traction shoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water, rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush and wash off with lukewarm water Do not machine wash Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
